groups.theme: Meditation sessions interrupted (pausing, stopping, or restarting mid-session)
example_reviews: sometimes using app meditation stopped
sometimes meditation cut mid session due connection issue app restart
currently meditation keep auto pausing say offline despite perfect connection
used love app meditation great really help get sleep using app two year issue christmas suddenly started switching mid meditation
meditation session relaxing needed break
app stop mid meditation saying problem session cut short unpredictable basis
groups.notes: Removed general performance reviews and kept only issues specifically about meditation interruptions (pausing, stopping, cutting off mid-session).

groups.theme: Subscription, billing, and account access issues
example_reviews: sudden price increase doubled cost app notification change found subscription renewed
stuck endless loop trying log old account
renewal premium charged higher premium disappointing
worked perfectly fine free trial premium feature lost access everything since cancelling
poor app poor customer support high cost alot issue renewal without informing
awful app charged year refund option
groups.notes: Theme clarified to include login/account issues since many reviews involve not being able to access paid accounts, not just billing issues.

groups.theme: App crashes, bugs, and overall performance issues
example_reviews: update becoming buggy crash way often lag playing session
paid high amount app keep crashing mid session
app buggy point unusable frequently connect internet
app extremely frustrating slow constantly crashing
app unbearably slow often freeze mid session
groups.notes: Separated from H1 by focusing on general app instability (crashes, lag, freezing), not just meditation interruptions.

groups.theme: Paywall and high subscription cost limiting access
example_reviews: completely paywalled subscription overpriced worth
pay everything app good
access anything either pay yearly subscription
quite literally everything paid nothing free
expensive getting student discount impossible
groups.notes: Removed unrelated privacy complaint (review 4). Focused strictly on paywall, pricing, and affordability concerns.

groups.theme: Cluttered UI, missing features, and poor user experience
example_reviews: ui way much content super cluttered
please make setting turn haptic feedback
app functionality suck either open open feature stop working
basic functionality issues track pause crash
update good fact voice text hard keep typing
groups.notes: Removed unrelated positive review. Expanded theme to include UX issues, missing features, and interface frustrations.
